title: 'We're right on track', says Streeting as key target for hospital waiting times hit
snippet: Government his its interim target of 65% of patients in England being treated within 18 weeks.

title: Olly Murs cheered on in charity challenge
snippet: The singer is running, cycling and rowing between Manchester and London to raise money for charity.

title: Gunshots fired in Philippine Senate where lawmaker wanted by ICC is holed up
snippet: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, a former police chief, enforced former President Rodrigo Duterte's deadly drug war.

title: UK economy sees surprise growth in March despite Iran war
snippet: The economy grew by 0.3% in the month, official figures show, confounding  analysts' forecasts of a small contraction.

title: Trump's Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh confirmed by US Senate
snippet: Kevin Warsh was confirmed by the narrowest margin since the role required a Senate confirmation vote.

title: Tui sees summer sales fall 10% due to cautious UK customers
snippet: The travel operator says customers are delaying booking holidays over Iran war concerns.

title: Is this actually what Anne Boleyn looked like?
snippet: An algorithm has suggested images of what were thought to be Anne Boleyn might not be.

title: UK alcohol deaths fall for first time since Covid pandemic
snippet: Experts say the “modest reduction” is “not cause for complacency”, with calls to redouble efforts to slash deaths further.

title: Woman in bank row over depositing £900 HMRC cheque
snippet: Annabel Yates says she faces a 94 mile round trip to bank a cheque because of changes at Lloyds.

title: Warning higher Europe air fares 'inevitable' due to Iran war
snippet: Flying by air will get more expensive as oil prices remain high, says international industry body boss.

title: Trade, Iran and Taiwan on the agenda as Trump arrives in China for high-stakes talks with Xi
snippet: The US president says his first request to Xi would be to  "open up" China, while Beijing is expected to press Trump on the status of Taiwan.

title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
snippet: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
snippet: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.

title: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
snippet: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.

title: Massive Alaska megatsunami was second largest ever recorded
snippet: New research suggests glacier melt driven by climate change is increasing the risk of giant waves.
